channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Audi ZERØ Concept Car Redefines Automotive Design with Minimalist Geometry
item.description: The Audi ZERØ, a speculative electric vehicle concept by designer Wini Camacho, challenges traditional automotive design through its radical use of geometric forms. This two-seater car features a sing...

item.title: Hezbollah's uncertain future as Lebanese support dwindles
item.description: Hezbollah faces a pivotal decision as its influence in Lebanon declines, with potential paths including political transformation, rebranding its military wing, or gradual marginalisation. The group's ...

item.title: Anthropic Settles $1.5B Copyright Lawsuit Over AI Training Practices
item.description: A federal judge has finalized the approval of Anthropic’s $1.5 billion copyright settlement with authors and publishers who sued the AI company over its use of copyrighted books to train its models. T...

item.title: Open Letter to the Philippine Senate on the Need for Leadership and Reform
item.description: Mon Abrea, a tax expert and advisor, writes an open letter to the Philippine Senate criticizing its focus on political drama and division instead of addressing national issues. He highlights the burde...

item.title: A mother's relentless pursuit of justice in a Mexican criminal case
item.description: The article details the extraordinary journey of a Mexican mother, Mrs Wallace, who took it upon herself to investigate the disappearance of her son. After authorities failed to provide answers, she b...

item.title: Calgary Sees Rise in Water Rescue Calls Amid Safety Concerns
item.description: Calgary emergency crews are reporting a significant increase in water rescue calls this summer compared to 2025, according to a recent report. Assistant Deputy Chief James Docherty of the Calgary Fire...

item.title: Historic Venus Mission Reveals First Surface Transmission from Another Planet
item.description: In December 1970, the Soviet Venera 7 probe made history by becoming the first spacecraft to transmit data from the surface of another planet. Despite initial confusion, engineers later discovered 23 ...

item.title: Vinicius Jr Undergoes Chin Cosmetic Surgery as Fans React
item.description: Real Madrid star Vinicius Jr has sparked online debates after a viral video showed changes to his facial profile, fueling speculation about cosmetic surgery. Brazilian outlet TMC reported he allegedly...

item.title: Tanzania-Egypt Business Forum Concludes with Two MoUs and Seven EOIs to Boost Trade and Industrial Development
item.description: The Tanzania Investment and Special Economic Zones Authority (TISEZA) recently concluded a significant business forum between Tanzania and Egypt, resulting in the signing of two Memorandums of Underst...

item.title: Avengers: Doomsday Trailer Reveals Multiverse Conflict with Doctor Doom
item.description: Marvel has released the first full trailer for 'Avengers: Doomsday,' marking the start of the Multiverse Saga's final chapter. The film brings together heroes from multiple universes, including Chris ...

item.title: Gauteng Premier Lesufi Emphasizes Mandela's Legacy in Combating Poverty and Inequality
item.description: Premier Panyaza Lesufi calls on Gauteng residents to honor Nelson Mandela's legacy by actively addressing poverty and inequality. The article highlights Mandela Month as a time for collective action, ...

item.title: Nigeria Capacity Index 2026 Says Stronger Institutions and Better Coordination Are Key to National Development
item.description: This opinion article argues that Nigeria's long-standing development challenges cannot be fully explained by common indicators like GDP, inflation, debt levels or oil production alone. Instead, Dr Han...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange Surges 1,200 Points as Oil Prices Dip Amid US-Iran Mediation
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) benchmark index surged nearly 1,200 points during intraday trading on Tuesday, driven by global oil price declines and optimism around renewed US-Iran mediation effor...

item.title: Enbridge Sunrise Pipeline Expansion Begins Near Prince George, Boosting Regional Economy
item.description: The Enbridge Sunrise pipeline expansion project has officially started near Prince George, British Columbia, marking a significant step in Canada's energy infrastructure development. Federal Natural R...

item.title: Museveni's Grandson Graduates from Prestigious Exeter University
item.description: Mugina Karugire, the grandson of Ugandan President Yoweri Museveni, has graduated from the University of Exeter in the UK, a top-tier Russell Group institution. His mother, Natasha Museveni, shared th...

item.title: Tanzanian golfers excel at Arusha Open, with Nathwani and Olomi leading the way
item.description: Local golfer Jay Nathwani claimed victory at the Arusha Open Golf Tournament, securing the title with consistent performance across three rounds. The tournament, held at his home course, saw Nathwani ...

item.title: Farmers protest against proposed India-US trade deal with march to Delhi
item.description: Thousands of farmers from Haryana and Punjab have gathered at the Shambhu border, which separates the two states, ahead of a planned march to Delhi. The protesters are demanding action against the pro...

item.title: Pakistani Physician Elected Chair of US Religious Freedom Commission
item.description: Dr. Asif Mahmood, a Pakistani-born physician and human rights advocate, has been unanimously elected as the chair of the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom (USCIRF) for the 20...

item.title: Wilderdark: A First-Person Survival Horror Game Set in a Mysterious Island
item.description: Junkfish, the Malaysian indie game studio, announced Wilderdark, its first-person survival horror adventure, set for release on Steam on 3 November 2026. Players are deployed by a mysterious organizat...

item.title: Johannesburg High Court to Deliver Judgment in Usindiso Building Arson Case
item.description: The Johannesburg High Court is set to deliver judgment in the case of alleged Usindiso building arsonist Sithembiso Mdlalose, who faces 76 counts of murder and 12 attempted murder charges linked to th...
